Eza Asur has also been a steady contributor for USC, scoring double figures in 25 of 27 games this season, giving them yet another reliable scoring option. Now when you dive into the defensive numbers, it becomes even clearer why this sets up as a scoring game. On top of that, both teams rank bottom five in the entire country in opponent free throw percentage allowed, meaning teams consistently shoot well at the line against them.
